sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n92435" key="r(izofoi/thtos" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="full" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">ῥιζο-φοίτητος</orth>, <itype lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="itype">ον</itype>, <sense id="n92435.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">coming from a root</tr_>, <cit TEIform="cit"> <quote_ lang="greek" TEIform="quote">φλέβες φοίνικος</quote_> <bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg0328.tlg001:39" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Chaerem.</author> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">39</biblScope></bibl></cit>.</sense> </entryFree>
